## Describe the Issue

What principle, layer, or output is not working as documented?

## AI Model Used

Which AI model were you using? (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, local model, etc.)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Copied SPEC.md into [system prompt / custom instructions / etc.]
2. Asked the AI to [specific task]
3. Expected [specific behavior based on spec]
4. Got [actual behavior]

## Expected vs Actual

**Expected:** The spec says [principle/layer] should produce [behavior].
**Actual:** The AI produced [different behavior].

## Additional Context

Any screenshots, conversation logs, or additional details.
